items.khQuestion: What is a persisted query and why should I use it?

khAnswer.html: A persisted query is a GraphQL query saved on the AEM server and executed via HTTP GET. This makes it cacheable at CDN level — unlike POST-based queries which bypass the cache entirely.

items.khQuestion: When should I use AEM GraphQL over the Content Services REST API?

khAnswer.html: Use GraphQL when your content model is developer-designed with complex relationships and you need multi-channel delivery. Use Content Services when marketers need to control the API shape via drag-and-drop components.
